stories: Good morning Sean, it's Saturday the twenty-third of May 2026
On this day in 1995, Sun Microsystems unveiled Java - built on "Write once, run anywhere
" Thirty-one years later it underpins most banking systems, Android, and software sent to space
Your day: morning run at six-thirty, then BHP Fun Day at the Singapore Oceanarium from nine forty-five to seven PM out at RWS Sentosa
Pack sunscreen - it should be a great one
Singapore news: Ecosperity week wrapped with momentum
The government is pushing carbon offset frameworks to fund clean energy across Asia, cementing Singapore's role in regional climate finance
Senior Minister of State Koh Poh Koon has resigned from political office
Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the twenty-third of May, 2026
Here's a quick fact to kick things off: on this date in 1995, Sun Microsystems unveiled Java to the world, built around the motto "Write once, run anywhere
" Thirty-one years later it underpins most banking systems, the Android platform, and software that's been sent to space
Not bad for something named after a cup of coffee
Morning run at six-thirty - perfect timing before the heat kicks in
Then it's a big one: BHP Fun Day at the Singapore Oceanarium from nine forty-five through to seven in the evening
You're out at RWS Sentosa, so pack sunscreen
On the climate front, Singapore's Ecosperity week has closed with real momentum
Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the twenty-second of May, 2026
A quick fact to kick things off: today is National Maritime Day in the United States
On this date in 1819, the steamship Savannah became the first vessel to cross the Atlantic with the help of steam power
completing the voyage from Georgia to Liverpool in 29 days
She was mostly under sail, but that engine made the history books
Global shipping has not stopped reinventing itself since
NTUC First Campus has developed a new set of resources to help pre-school teachers support children with different learning and developmental needs
It is a quiet policy move, but an important one for early childhood inclusion in the sector
